name: Organic Clear
description: Pure plant-extract conditioner that speeds the breakdown of organic pollutants, promotes beneficial microorganisms and produces crystal-clear water while supporting the immune system. 500 ml.

name: Anti Tox
description: 100% natural high-activity zeolite suspension that rapidly binds heavy metals (copper, zinc, cadmium), ammonium and chlorine — ideal for fresh-water prep and filter failures. Shake well before use. Sizes 500 ml / 5000 ml.

name: FirstBite Artemia Nauplii — 50 ml
description: The gold-standard starter food: freshly packed Artemia nauplii (brine shrimp) for ornamental fish larvae, young fish, shrimp and corals. Real nauplii — not frozen, not boiled, not decapsulated eggs.
details:
**NaturePur – FirstBite Artemia Nauplii (Discusfood) · Article No. 40004 · 50 ml**

Attention: Real nauplii, not decapsulated eggs.

The No. 1 starter food for ornamental fish, shrimp and corals. Artemia nauplii are considered the gold standard worldwide in larvae and young-fish rearing, in professional aquaculture and the demanding hobby sector alike. No other starter food is accepted as reliably by fish larvae as freshly hatched Artemia nauplii.

Our Artemia nauplii come from controlled aquaculture, are freshly packed and **not frozen or boiled down**, which allows a storage life of up to 12 months without any loss of nutrients or acceptability.

The ideal particle size (optimal for small mouths) stimulates immediate food contact and intake. Movement, chemical signals and natural structure trigger feeding activity, so nauplii are eaten more readily and digested more effectively — contributing to better growth and the structural development of the digestive organs.

**Benefits**
- Fresh, not frozen or cooked — harvested fresh and pickled to preserve nutrients, enzymes and acceptance.
- Long storage life — up to 12 months without loss of quality.
- Can be enriched with omega-3 fatty acids, vitamins or carotenoids for pigmentation and immune support.
- Universally applicable: freshwater and saltwater, larvae and young fish of all common ornamental species, invertebrates and corals.
- Rich in protein, amino acids and essential fatty acids (omega-3, incl. EPA/DHA); functional digestive enzymes support assimilation and growth.
- Seawater specialists also use it for corals and fish.

**Usage:** After opening the bottle, store in the refrigerator and use within 10 days.

**Analytical constituents:** Crude protein 2.96% · Crude fat 0.6% · Crude fiber 0.5% · Crude ash 0.36% · Moisture 92%.

name: Discus Minerals
description: Balanced minerals and trace elements (no NaCl) to remineralise osmosis/soft water — supports osmoregulation, spawning, growth and stable water. 1 g per 10 L ≈ +3° GH. Sizes 300 g / 1000 g.

name: FirstBite Daphnia — 30 ml
description: Species-appropriate natural premium food: Discusfood Daphnia (water fleas), rich in fibre to aid digestion and prevent obesity. Hygienically safe, looks alive — not frozen.
details:
**FirstBite Daphnia – natural premium food for healthy ornamental fish (Discusfood) · Article No. 40003 · 30 ml**

Daphnia (water fleas) are among the most popular natural foods in aquatics. They represent species-appropriate nutrition with high acceptance and gentle digestion in community aquariums and professional breeding.

Discusfood Daphnia come from controlled aquaculture, are freshly harvested, carefully cleaned and then placed in a solution. They look as if they are alive but are **hygienically safe** and can be stored for up to 12 months without freezing.

Daphnia are part of the natural diet of many ornamental fish. Their shape and movement (visually alive) immediately trigger the feeding instinct. **Rich in fibre & aids digestion:** the high chitin content has a regulating effect on the intestines and prevents digestive problems and obesity — also ideal as a "relief food". A gentle energy source, Daphnia provide high-quality proteins with a comparatively low-fat content, perfect for regular feeding. Enriched with vitamins: by soaking them in a vitamin solution, Discusfood Daphnia specifically support the immune system, vitality and stress resistance.

**Which fish particularly like to eat daphnia?** Daphnia are extremely versatile and especially well accepted by:
- Livebearers (guppies, platies, mollies, swordtails)
- Tetra & barbs
- Cichlids (also discus, as supplementary food)
- Killifish
- Labyrinth fish (e.g. bettas, gouramis)
- Juvenile fish and adolescent animals of many species

**Usage:** Shake well before use. Once opened, store in the refrigerator and use within 10 days. Not suitable for human consumption; keep out of reach of children.

**Analytical constituents:** Crude protein 5.78% · Crude fat 0.6% · Crude fiber 0.5% · Crude ash 2.2% · Moisture 92%.

name: NaturePur Artemia Adult — 360 g
description: A genuine innovation from Discusfood: a new generation of adult Artemia (brine shrimp) in natural solution — nutritionally stable, water-quality friendly, neither frozen nor boiled. Promotes growth, vitality and colourfulness.
details:
**NaturePur Artemia Adult — Artemia / Brine Shrimps Adult (Discusfood) · Article No. 40001 · Net weight 360 g (12.69 oz)**

A genuine innovation from Discusfood. With the introduction of Artemia in nutrient solution, Discusfood was one of the pioneers on the market — a concept that quickly found imitators. In practice, however, many products had a problem: bacterial blooms that developed when the liquid was added to the aquarium, impairing water quality.

We took this challenge as an opportunity to completely revise our product and perfect it technically. The result is a **new generation of Artemia products** that are not only safe, but also particularly **nutritionally stable** and practical to use. Our Artemia Adult is the first product in this new line.

Artemia is one of the most valuable food animals in aquatics. Whether in the rearing phase or as a varied supplementary food, Artemia provides valuable nutrients, **promotes growth, vitality and colourfulness**, and is readily accepted by almost all species of ornamental fish. It is preserved in a natural solution and is **neither frozen nor boiled**, in keeping with NaturePur standards.

An innovative premium food that makes everyday life easier for aquarium owners, ensuring healthy, lively and colourful fish. Suitable for saltwater and freshwater ornamental fish.

**Usage:** Single feed for ornamental fish. Once opened, store in the refrigerator and use within 10 days. Not suitable for human consumption; keep out of reach of children.

**Analytical constituents:** Crude protein ≥ 4.62% · Crude fat ≥ 0.7% · Crude fiber ≤ 0.5% · Crude ash ≤ 2.2% · Total phosphorus ≥ 0.11% · Moisture ≤ 91.8%.

name: NaturePur Artemia Adult Spirulina
description: Adult Artemia (brine shrimp) enriched with spirulina microalgae — a performance booster with added energy, colour and vitality for freshwater ornamental fish and shrimp.
details:
**Discusfood Artemia with Spirulina.** Adult Artemia enriched through targeted feeding with spirulina, a nutrient-rich microalgae, so these feed animals become real performance boosters. Spirulina has an exceptionally dense nutrient profile — highly digestible proteins, essential fatty acids and natural pigments such as carotenoids. Studies show that Artemia enriched with spirulina contain significantly more β-carotene and polyunsaturated fatty acids, offering more nutritional value than unenriched Artemia. From controlled aquaculture, freshly pickled, not frozen or boiled — shelf life up to 12 months.

Suitable for discus & large cichlids, dwarf cichlids, livebearers, barbs/tetras, bottom-dwelling fish, shrimps & invertebrates, large shrimp & crayfish and snails. Promotes growth, vitality, colouration, moulting and intestinal health.

name: For Discus Daily Granulate
description: Balanced complete granulate especially for discus and all granulate-loving fish, with vitamins, minerals, trace elements and probiotics for everyday nutrition. Sizes 80 g / 230 g / 2800 g.

name: American Cichlids Spirulina Soft Pearls
description: Varied, balanced plant-based soft granulate for herbivorous American cichlids. High-fibre spirulina with carotenoids for healthy digestion and vitality. No colours or preservatives.

name: American Cichlids Color Soft Pearls
description: High-protein soft granulate for carnivorous American cichlids with krill and spirulina carotenoids for magnificent colour. Highly digestible; won't cloud the water.

name: African Cichlids Spirulina Soft Pearls
description: Varied, balanced plant-based soft granulate for herbivorous African cichlids. Spirulina-rich and high in fibre for healthy digestion and vitality. No colours or preservatives.

name: African Cichlids Color Soft Pearls
description: High-protein soft granulate for carnivorous African cichlids with krill and spirulina carotenoids for intense colour. Highly digestible and water-friendly.

name: Betta Special All Colors Soft
description: Soft granulate tuned to labyrinth fish (bettas). The soft texture protects the delicate mouth; omega-3 fish oil and digestible krill support vitality and growth. 50 g.

name: Guppy Super Special Soft
description: Sinking soft granulate for guppies and other livebearers (2–10 cm). Small grain size, pre-/probiotics and fibre for easy digestion, good growth and clear water. 80 g.

name: Beef Heart Soft Granulate
description: Soft, anti-swell complete granulate made from easily digestible pure beef protein (no blood, no long-chain collagen). Far lower water pollution than frozen beef heart. Sizes 80 g / 230 g / 2800 g.

name: Best Heart Flakes
description: A balanced staple flake built on easily digestible pure beef protein (hemoglobin removed) and enriched with vitamins, minerals and fibre. Bite-resistant — it does not cloud the water.

name: Cichlids XL Premium Granulate Composition 1
description: High-quality complete granulate for cichlids and large fish — plant-forward with 13.5% Chlorella, fennel and a little zeolite for healthy digestion. Ideal paired with Composition 2. 500 g.

name: Best Heart Flakes Pro Breed
description: Highly functional Best Heart flake with vitamins, minerals and probiotics to prepare discus for breeding and promote spawning readiness. Use as a breeding supplement, not a staple.

name: Turkey Heart Soft Granulate
description: Soft granulate staple for keepers who want animal protein without beef — only the digestible parts of turkey protein, with much lower water load than frozen turkey heart. Sizes 80 g / 230 g.

name: Breeder Starter Food 1 Soft Granulate
description: Soft rearing granulate for fish 1–3 cm. Anti-swell, highly palatable and proven to give higher growth and survival than beef heart. Feed 5–8× daily. 500 g.

name: Breeder Starter Food 2 Soft Granulate
description: Follow-on soft rearing granulate for fish 3–8 cm. Soft, natural-feeling and parasite-safe for optimum growth. Feed 3–4× daily. 500 g.

name: Angelfish Special Soft Granulate
description: Soft granulate tuned to angelfish feeding habits and suitable for almost all soft-water fish. 48.8% protein with vitamins, minerals and pre-/probiotics; won't injure mouths or cloud the water. Sizes 80 g / 230 g.

name: Guppy Super Color Soft
description: Sinking soft granulate for guppies and livebearers with natural astaxanthin from krill for optimal colour development, plus pre-/probiotics for healthy digestion. 80 g.

name: Wels (Catfish) Special Soft Granulate
description: Fast-sinking soft catfish granulate with molluscs, crustaceans, algae and yeasts to support metabolism, growth and vitality. Soft texture mimics natural prey. Sizes 80 g / 230 g.

name: FD Artemia (Freeze-Dried)
description: High-quality freeze-dried Artemia (brine shrimp). Very easily digestible, rich in natural proteins and essential nutrients — ideal for daily feeding.
details:
**Freeze-dried (FD) food – premium natural food for ornamental fish.** A modern method of feed preservation: water is removed from fresh organisms at very low temperatures, keeping nutrients, proteins, fats, vitamins and natural bioactives largely stable — better than conventional drying or heat dehydration. A safe, long-lasting and well-accepted alternative to frozen or live food, without the need for a cold chain.

FD Artemia is a natural source of protein and fat with natural carotenoids that support colour and metabolism. Widely accepted — almost all freshwater fish enjoy it; ideal for a varied diet or as a supplement to everyday food. Suitable for discus, angelfish, tetras, guppies, dwarf cichlids and saltwater fish.

**Analytical constituents:** Crude protein 48% · Crude fat 5% · Crude fiber 5% · Moisture < 5%. No preservatives. Feeding: feed daily or several times a week in small amounts; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: Minerals — Sodium-Chloride-Free Mineral Supplement
description: A naturally balanced mineral supplement without sodium chloride (table salt), for fish kept in the neutral pH range — supports water chemistry, health and vitality.
details: **Discusfood Minerals — naturally balanced, without sodium chloride.** With the rare Discusfood Minerals, you offer a mineral supplement completely free of table salt (sodium chloride). Many products on the market rely on cheap sodium chloride; ours provides the important minerals and trace elements fish actually need, naturally balanced, ideal for soft-water and neutral pH-range species such as discus. Supports stable water chemistry, osmoregulation, health and vitality without burdening sensitive fish with unnecessary salt.

name: Vitamin-Shot
description: Concentrated vitamin & trace-element complex added to the food (not the water) for maximum uptake — strengthens the immune system, promotes growth and intensifies colours.
details: **Vitamin-Shot from Discusfood.** Why add vitamins to food rather than water? Efficiency, effectiveness and safety: vitamins go directly into the fish (not the filter), with higher bioavailability, no water pollution, precise dosage for every fish, and protection against light/oxygen degradation. Our special vitamin and trace-element mixture is developed to strengthen the immune system, promote growth and visibly intensify colours — unique on the market in this composition. Add to the feed before feeding.

name: FD Artemia + Spirulina (Freeze-Dried)
description: Freeze-dried Artemia combined with valuable spirulina algae. Supports the immune system, digestion and colour intensity — a balanced supplementary feed.
details:
**FD Artemia + Spirulina.** Artemia supplemented with spirulina, a nutrient-rich microalgae with natural pigments, protein and vitamins, used in aquatics to promote colour brilliance and the immune system. The synergy of Artemia protein and spirulina nutrients makes this a premium mixture for health and appearance. Recommended for discus, angelfish, cichlids, tetras, guppies, saltwater fish, young fish and shrimp.

**Analytical constituents:** Crude protein 49% · Crude fat 6% · Crude fiber 4% · Crude ash 15% · Moisture < 5%. Feeding: feed in small amounts daily or several times a week; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: Breeding Filter (2025)
description: New 2025 in-tank breeding filter with an uncoloured natural sponge that prevents larvae escaping into a dark filter and dying. Replaceable sponge (Art. 30187). Innovation and sustainability from Discusfood.

name: Cichlids XL Premium Granulate Composition 2
description: High-quality complete granulate for cichlids and large fish with a high share of natural prey animals and a nine-herb blend for organs and immunity. Ideal paired with Composition 1. 500 g.

name: Bio Sponge Filter 150L
description: In-tank biological sponge filter for up to 150 L with a mechanical sponge plus a biocore for excellent biological filtration and constant aeration. Pollutant-free new material; PPI 35 sponge replaceable (Art. 30185). Air pump not included.

name: Bio Sponge Filter 350L
description: In-tank biological sponge filter for up to 350 L with a mechanical sponge plus biocore for excellent biological filtration and aeration. Pollutant-free new material; PPI 35 sponge replaceable (Art. 30186). Air pump not included.

name: Golden Color Booster (No.8)
description: Colour additive that enhances yellow colouration in all yellow fish and shrimp (golden discus, arowana, bettas, cichlids…). Mix into frozen, FD or dry food. 20 g bag.

name: Plecs & Catfish Carni Wafers
description: Sinking carni wafers for carnivorous plecos and bottom-dwelling catfish — protein-rich, slowly dissolving chips tailored to the natural diet of meat-eating L-catfish.
details: **Plecs & Catfish Carni Wafers.** Food chips tailored to the special dietary habits of carnivorous catfish. Like the algae wafers, they mimic the natural food found growing on stones, roots and substrate, but with a protein-rich profile for meat-eating species. Produced by a low-heat extrusion process that preserves all valuable nutrients and vitamins, then shaped into small, fast-sinking, stable chips so L-catfish and other bottom-dwelling carnivores can graze at their own pace. Supports digestion, growth and condition.

name: Catfish Special Soft Granulate
description: Fast-sinking, soft special granulate for catfish — high-quality molluscs, crustaceans, algae and yeasts that support metabolism, growth and vitality.
details: **Catfish Special Soft Granulate.** A fast-sinking, soft special granulate for feeding bottom-dwelling catfish in freshwater aquariums. The high-quality ingredients — selected molluscs and crustaceans, algae, yeasts, oils and fats, minerals and vitamins — promote the health, vitality, metabolism and growth of catfish. The pleasant softness gives the granulate a consistency very similar to natural prey, so it is exceptionally well accepted and can be fed several times a day in small portions. One of the most popular and effective catfish granulates on the market.

name: Discus Protector
description: The proven quarantine-bath treatment for new discus and fish — used over 100,000 times worldwide for safe acclimatisation. A 15-minute short bath before stocking. Read the instructions before use.

name: Crystal-Clean Nitrate Remover (Filter Media)
description: High-performance filter substrate that reliably reduces nitrate down to 0 mg/l. Regenerable up to 300 times. Ideal for plantless tanks such as cichlid or breeding setups.
details:
**Discusfood Premium Filter Media — Crystal-Clean Nitrate Remover.** One of the most powerful nitrate filter media on the market. This high-quality substrate reliably reduces nitrate in the long term — regardless of where your fish come from. Particularly popular with discus and perch enthusiasts: effective, easy to handle, and regenerable up to 300 times, saving water and reducing costs. Supplied in a practical filter bag for quick, reusable application.

Reduces nitrate to 0 mg/l — suitable for all water types (African, South American or Asian). Sizes: CW 001 (150–250 L) · CW 002 (250 L) · CW 003 (350–650 L). Place in the area of strongest flow (ideally the last filter chamber). Regenerate by dissolving 1 kg of iodine-free, anti-caking-free salt in 10 L water, soak the bag 30 minutes, then rinse thoroughly before reuse.

name: Black Water Nitrate Remover (Filter Media)
description: Filter media developed for South American aquariums: reduces nitrate without removing humic substances, preserving natural black-water chemistry for sensitive species.
details: **Discusfood Premium Filter Media — Black Water Nitrate Remover.** Specially developed for South American (black-water) aquariums. This filter material reduces nitrate levels while leaving humic substances in the water, preserving the natural water chemistry that sensitive species such as discus, angelfish and tetras depend on. Effective, long-term nitrate reduction; regenerable up to 300 times; environmentally friendly and economical. Supplied in a practical filter bag.

name: Plant Aquarium Nitrate Remover (Filter Media)
description: Filter media for planted tanks: reduces excess nitrate but leaves the small amount plants need for growth — without endangering fish or shrimp.
details: **Discusfood Premium Filter Media — Plant Aquarium Nitrate Remover.** The perfect filter medium for planted aquariums. It reduces excess nitrate but deliberately leaves a small amount in the water that plants need for healthy growth — without endangering the health of fish or shrimp. Effective, long-term and sustainable nitrate control; regenerable up to 300 times; supplied in a practical, easy-to-use filter bag.

name: LAB & Herbs — Lactic Acid Bacteria + Medicinal Herbs
description: A Made-in-Germany water/feed additive combining highly active lactic acid bacteria with selected medicinal herb extracts to support digestion, immunity and a stable aquarium ecosystem.
details: **Discusfood Lactic Acid Bacteria & Medicinal Herbs (MS-Bacteria + medicinal herbs).** A unique combination of highly active lactic acid bacteria (LAB) and a carefully selected complex of traditional medicinal plants (fenugreek, ribwort plantain, thyme, nettle leaves and more). LAB continuously support intestinal flora, digestion and the immune system, improving microbial balance and nutrient utilisation. The herb complex is antioxidant, anti-inflammatory and naturally stabilising, supporting the intestinal barrier and regeneration of mucous membranes. Promotes growth and vitality; dissolves completely without harmful residues, cloudiness or deposits. Made in Germany; full activity retained for up to three years when stored cool and dry.

name: Royal Catappa
description: Powerful 100% natural catappa concentrate with antibacterial and fungicidal action — neutralises bacteria, germs and fungi, protects spawn and mucous membranes. Sizes 500 ml / 5000 ml.

name: Amazon Tonic
description: Pure natural extract of South American barks and plants (tannins) for disease prophylaxis — protects mucous membranes, prevents spawn fungus, lowers germ load and does not colour the water. Sizes 500 ml / 5000 ml.

name: Artemia 50% Soft Granulate
description: Soft, anti-swell 50% Artemia granulate for small to large fish — also loved by shrimp keepers. Available as Soft (0.5–0.8 mm) and XL (1.5–2 mm).

name: Artemia 50% Flat Granulate
description: A unique fully extruded granulate in flake form made of 50% pure Artemia. Stable, slow-sinking and greedily accepted even by demanding wild discus. Sizes 65 g / 150 g.

name: Frutti di Mare
description: Premium granulate in flake form with squid, krill, shrimp and fish meal plus green-lipped mussel, Chlorella, Moringa, kelp and garlic. A top food for both freshwater and marine aquaria.

name: Natural Humin
description: Ultra-pure humic substances that turn tap water into natural soft/black water — bind heavy metals, protect mucous membranes, prevent spawn fungus and create a black-water effect. pH-neutral. Sizes 500 ml / 5000 ml.

name: Anti-Stress — Aloe Vera & B-Vitamins
description: A water additive with aloe vera and a B-vitamin complex that helps fish cope with stress — supporting mucous membranes, wound healing and resistance.
details: **Anti-stress water additive from Discusfood.** With vital herbs, aloe vera and a vitamin B complex. Stress from transport, water changes, handling or new tank mates weakens fish. This additive supports the natural protective mucous layer and skin/gill membranes, aids regeneration and wound healing, and helps fish stay calm and resilient. Ideal during acclimatisation, after transport or alongside treatments. Promotes general well-being and long-term vitality. For ornamental fish in fresh and saltwater.

name: Bacto+ Bakterien+ — Filter Starter Bacteria
description: A concentrated live filter-bacteria culture that rapidly establishes and stabilises the biological filter, breaking down ammonia and nitrite for clear, healthy water.
details: **Discusfood Bacto+ Bakterien+.** A high-quality culture of beneficial bacteria that quickly colonise filter and substrate to build and maintain a stable biological filter. They accelerate the nitrogen cycle, break down toxic ammonia and nitrite, and help prevent cloudiness — essential when setting up a new tank, after water changes, or after medication. Regular dosing keeps the biofilter active for clear, stable and healthy aquarium water.

name: Super Growth
description: Power flake that combines the benefits of beef heart without its collagen or blood. Digestive substances and rich vitamins/minerals drive excellent growth — a special growing food for all colourings.

name: Artemia 50% Cysts (Brine Shrimp Eggs)
description: Pure Artemia (brine shrimp) cysts for hatching live nauplii — the worldwide gold-standard first food. Hatching rate 90% and higher.

name: Decapsulated Artemia Eggs
description: Decapsulated brine shrimp eggs — an excellent rearing food for all marine and freshwater fish. Fed directly without incubation; high nutrient and fibre content for healthy growth and natural colours.

name: Artemia 50% Micro Granulate Soft
description: Ultra-fine (0.01–0.04 mm) soft micro-granulate for efficient rearing of fish larvae and shrimp. The soft coating stops it swelling in the gut and boosts acceptance.

name: Artemia 50% Soft Tabs
description: Artemia 50% pressed into stable, slow-sinking tabs for catfish, Corydoras, shrimp and almost all fresh- and saltwater fish. Heat-sensitive nutrients are added after pressing so they stay fully effective. New for 2025.

name: Blue Color Booster (No.9)
description: The most-used colour enhancer for all tropical fish and shrimp — turns them deep blue and bright green, with 5% astaxanthin. Visible results within ~7 days. Mix into food. 20 g bag.

name: Additive No.1 – Probiotics
description: Probiotic feed additive based on Pediococcus acidilactici to improve intestinal flora and immunity, and greatly improve the digestibility of beef-heart products. Up to 10 g per kg of feed. 20 g bag.

name: Additive D7 – Pro Breeding
description: Vitamin and mineral additive for frozen and FD food mixtures that promotes egg and sperm fertility, growth and spawning readiness. Dose 2 g per 100 g of food. 20 g / 50 g bag.

name: Blood Red Color Booster (No.10)
description: Colour additive that intensifies red colouration in all red fish (arowana, oscars, red discus, koi, goldfish…). Mix 2 g per 100 g of food; feed once a month for 7 days. 20 g bag.

name: Best Heart Flakes Blue Dream
description: Best Heart flake with Color Booster Blue to intensively support blue pigmentation, plus vitamins, minerals and probiotics. A supplementary colour food.

name: Grand Champion Granulate
description: Balanced staple granulate for discus with carefully selected vitamins, trace elements and animal/plant energy sources — formulated to grow champions. Sizes 80 g / 230 g.

name: Buffet di Insect
description: Premium flake granulate made from over 50% freeze-dried insects — the natural food of most fish. A clean, parasite-free alternative to frozen insect food.

name: Best Heart Flakes Red Dream
description: Best Heart flake with Color Booster Red — our best red colour food to strengthen all red pigments, not only in discus. A supplementary colour food.

name: Pleco & Catfish Algae Wafers
description: Extruded sinking wafers for herbivorous plecos and L-catfish that mimic natural aufwuchs (algae growth). Low-heat made so nutrients and vitamins are preserved. Sizes 50 g / 150 g.

name: Pleco & Catfish Carni Wafers
description: Extruded sinking wafers for carnivorous plecos and L-catfish — protein-rich and mimicking natural aufwuchs. Low-heat made to preserve nutrients. Sizes 50 g / 150 g.

name: FD Bloodworms S (Freeze-Dried)
description: Small freeze-dried red mosquito larvae. Protein-rich natural food, ideal for smaller fish species and young fish.
details:
**FD Bloodworms S — freeze-dried red mosquito larvae (small).** A natural treat that is very well eaten by most fish species. The small (S) format is ideal for smaller species such as tetras and guppies, and for young fish. Protein-rich, with natural taste and high acceptance. Recommended for neon tetras, cardinal fish, dwarf cichlids, killifish, guppies and betta fish.

Feed daily or several times a week in small amounts; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: FD Bloodworms XL (Freeze-Dried)
description: Large freeze-dried red mosquito larvae with high energy content. Ideal for larger ornamental fish and demanding species.
details:
**FD Bloodworms XL — freeze-dried red mosquito larvae (large).** High energy content, especially suited to large cichlids, predatory catfish and other large carnivores. A natural treat with high acceptance. Recommended for discus, angelfish, larger cichlids, piranhas, rays and arowana.

Feed daily or several times a week in small amounts; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: FD Tubifex (Freeze-Dried)
description: Freeze-dried tubifex worms with very high protein and fat content. Promotes fitness, growth and spawning readiness.
details:
**FD Tubifex — protein booster for predatory fish.** Tubifex worms are particularly rich in easily digestible protein and are very well accepted by many carnivorous species. Can be fed dry or soaked, remains high quality and is quickly accepted by fish instinct. Recommended for discus, angelfish, cichlids, catfish, tetras, guppies and betta fish.

Feed daily or several times a week in small amounts; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: FD Krill (Freeze-Dried)
description: Freeze-dried Antarctic krill, rich in astaxanthin for natural colour enhancement and a strong physique.
details:
**FD Krill — protein + astaxanthin.** Krill provides high-quality protein and natural astaxanthin, a carotenoid that enhances colour and has antioxidant properties. Ideal for larger species: the perfect addition to the diet of large freshwater and marine fish, or as a powerful supplement in your feeding plan. Recommended for discus, larger cichlids, predatory fish, rays, arowana and saltwater fish.

Feed daily or several times a week in small amounts; soak briefly in aquarium water before feeding.

name: Beef Heart Soft Granules
description: Soft, highly palatable granules based on beef heart — a protein-rich conditioning food that promotes vitality, growth and intense colour.
details: **Beef Heart Soft Granules.** A complete food for discus and other ornamental fish, based on beef heart — a classic conditioning and growth food. The soft granules are homogeneous and highly digestible, ideal for all important nutrients and well accepted even by demanding fish. Suitable for all water types, soft enough for small mouths, and a strong supplement for breeding and the structural growth and health of your ornamental fish.

name: Plecs & Catfish Algae Wafers
description: Sinking algae wafers for plecos and bottom-dwelling catfish — plant-rich, slowly dissolving chips tailored to the natural diet of herbivorous and omnivorous catfish.
details: **Plecs & Catfish Algae Wafers.** Special chips tailored to the natural dietary habits of bottom-dwelling fish. The wafers sink quickly and stay stable so plecos and catfish can graze at their own pace. Plant-rich and packed with valuable nutrients, they support healthy digestion, growth and condition for armoured catfish (Corydoras), L-catfish and other omnivorous/herbivorous species.
